title: varengevillea hispidissima
intro: Varengevillea hispidissima, also known as hairy vetch or hairy vetchling, is a perennial legume plant native to Europe. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Varengevillea hispidissima include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. It is commonly prepared as a tea or infusion, and its seeds can be used to make a powder or tincture for herbal remedies.
